name: kalshi_crypto_model
label: Kalshi crypto · vol model
method: Models P(BTC/ETH settles above strike) from live spot (Binance, fallback Coinbase) + recent 5m realized vol under a driftless lognormal, predicts each near-money Kalshi crypto threshold market, and scores the call against Kalshi's finalized ground-truth result. Tests whether a simple vol model is calibrated / beats the market on Kalshi crypto settlement.
risk: Paper / data-collection — NO edge claimed yet; accumulating model-vs-settlement calls to measure calibration. Collected live by the daily job (not the CSV harness). Live Kalshi orders gated behind the budget arm (P5).

provenance.hypothesis: A driftless lognormal vol model on live spot prices is well-calibrated for short-horizon Kalshi crypto settlement; deviations of the market-implied price from the model are a candidate edge.
